Package neqsim.process.processmodel.dexpi

package neqsim.process.processmodel.dexpi
DEXPI integration layer for importing and exporting P&ID data.

This package provides utilities for working with DEXPI (Data Exchange in the Process Industry) XML files, enabling round-trip import and export of process flow diagrams.

Key Components

  • DexpiXmlReader - Import DEXPI P&ID XML to ProcessSystem
  • DexpiXmlWriter - Export ProcessSystem to DEXPI XML
  • DexpiProcessUnit - Lightweight placeholder for imported equipment
  • DexpiStream - Runnable stream with DEXPI metadata
  • DexpiMetadata - Shared constants for DEXPI exchanges
  • DexpiRoundTripProfile - Validation for round-trip fidelity

Usage Example

 // Import from DEXPI XML
 ProcessSystem process = DexpiXmlReader.read(new File("plant.xml"), templateStream);

 // Access imported equipment
 DexpiProcessUnit pump = (DexpiProcessUnit) process.getUnit("P-101");
 EquipmentEnum type = pump.getMappedEquipment();

 // Export back to DEXPI XML
 DexpiXmlWriter.write(process, new File("export.xml"));
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    neqsim.process.processmodel
     
    neqsim.process.processmodel.diagram
    Professional Process Flow Diagram (PFD) generation for NeqSim.
    neqsim.process.processmodel.graph
    Graph-based process representation for NeqSim process flowsheets.
    neqsim.process.processmodel.lifecycle
    Lifecycle management for ProcessSystem models (Digital Twins).
    neqsim.process.processmodel.processmodules
     
  • Class
    Description
    DexpiEquipmentFactory
    Factory that converts DexpiProcessUnit placeholders into runnable NeqSim process equipment by matching the EquipmentEnum type and applying sizing attributes from DEXPI GenericAttributes.
    DexpiInstrumentInfo
    Holds metadata for an instrument parsed from a DEXPI XML file.
    DexpiLayoutConfig
    Configuration class for DEXPI layout parameters.
    DexpiLayoutEngine
    Computes auto-layout positions for DEXPI XML export.
    DexpiLayoutEngine.EquipmentPosition
    Holds computed position data for a single equipment item.
    DexpiLayoutEngine.StreamTableEntry
    Holds stream data for a single column in the stream data table.
    DexpiMappingLoader
    Loads DEXPI-to-NeqSim equipment and piping component mappings from properties files on the classpath.
    DexpiMetadata
    Shared constants describing the recommended DEXPI metadata handled by the reader and writer.
    DexpiProcessUnit
    Lightweight placeholder for equipment imported from a DEXPI XML file.
    DexpiRoundTripProfile
    Describes validation profiles for round-tripping DEXPI data through NeqSim.
    DexpiRoundTripProfile.Holder
     
    DexpiRoundTripProfile.ValidationResult
    Profile validation result.
    DexpiShapeCatalog
    Generates the DEXPI <ShapeCatalogue> section with ISO 10628:2012 standard P&ID symbols for process equipment.
    DexpiSimulationBuilder
    High-level builder that converts a DEXPI P&ID XML file into a runnable NeqSim ProcessSystem.
    DexpiStream
    Stream created from DEXPI piping segments while preserving key metadata.
    DexpiStreamUtils
    Shared utilities for resolving outlet streams from NeqSim process equipment.
    DexpiTopologyResolver
    Resolves the topology (stream connectivity) of a DEXPI P&ID XML document.
    DexpiTopologyResolver.ResolvedTopology
    The resolved topology of a DEXPI document, containing equipment IDs in topological order and the edges (connections) between them.
    DexpiTopologyResolver.TopologyEdge
    Represents a directed edge between two DEXPI elements in the process topology.
    DexpiXmlReader
    Utility for reading DEXPI XML files and converting them into NeqSim process models.
    DexpiXmlReaderException
    Exception thrown when there is an error reading a DEXPI XML file.
    DexpiXmlWriter
    Utility for exporting ProcessSystems created from DEXPI data back into a lightweight DEXPI XML representation.
    DexpiXmlWriter.NozzleConnection
    Simple connection descriptor linking an outlet nozzle to an inlet nozzle.
